3012040.name: Dart Companion
3012040.description:
The ultimate companion app for darts players – an accessible darts scoring calculator. With this app, you can easily create and manage multiple player profiles, save statistics and track your progress over time. Whether you’re a seasoned pro or just starting out, this app is for you.

As you play, the app will keep track of each players progress and calculate the scores, so you can focus on hitting those bullseyes. As you get closer to winning, the dart board will highlight the targets you need to hit to claim victory.

You also have the ability to customize scores and rules for each game. This means you can tailor each game to your skill level, making it fun and challenging for all players involved.

Take your darts game to the next level and enjoy a more exciting, interactive and personalized experience.
3012040.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
